fullHistory.content: Hi! I'm Roba Copilot, your MuJoCo robotics engineer. How can I help you today? Whether it's building or editing a robot model, tuning actuators, fixing simulation issues, or answering MuJoCo/MJCF questions — I'm ready to help! 🤖
